# Tables and Figures

<!-- Tables migrated from the latest draft. Figures are produced by scripts/100_exhibits.R into output/exhibits/figure/. -->

#### Table 1. Summary statistics of crop producers in Ghana 

  **Variable**                                          **Mean (SD)**                 ** **                          **Trend (%) ^a^**                                                         
  ------------------------------ ---------------------- ----------------------------- ------------------------------ ------------------- ----------------------- ----------------------------- ------------------------------
                                 **Pooled (n=26811)**   **No extraction (n=23957)**   **Some extraction (n=2854)**   ** **               **Pooled (n=26811)**    **No extraction (n=23957)**   **Some extraction (n=2854)**
  **Farmer**                                                                                                                                                                                   
  Female farmer (dummy)          0.26 (0.44)            0.89 (0.31)                   0.11 (0.31)                                        -1.50\*\*\* \[0.18\]    -0.24\*\*\* \[0.05\] †        2.04\*\*\* \[0.40\] †
  Age (years)                    46.66 (15.20)          46.61 (15.24) †               47.09 (14.85) †                                    0.27\*\*\* \[0.04\]     0.26\*\*\* \[0.04\] †         0.35\*\*\* \[0.12\] †
  Education (years)              4.09 (4.89)            4.01 (4.86) †                 4.78 (5.03) †                                      1.29\*\*\* \[0.14\]     1.26\*\*\* \[0.15\] †         1.60\*\*\* \[0.41\] †
  **Selected crop production**                                                                                                                                                                 
  All crops (real GH₵/ha)        1049.40 (1488.07)      1027.45 (1434.07)             1233.64 (1871.41)                                  5.62\*\*\* \[0.27\]     4.85\*\*\* \[0.19\]           12.79\*\*\* \[2.23\]
  Maize (Kg/ha)                  2131.75 (5928.87)      2074.86 (5780.25) †           2709.32 (7245.09) †                                4.18\*\*\* \[0.42\]     4.23\*\*\* \[0.44\] †         3.68\*\* \[1.48\] †
  Rice (Kg/ha)                   1212.70 (2289.06)      1221.50 (2336.04)             1117.40 (1699.43)                                  1.03 \[1.11\]           0.28 \[0.54\]                 14.11 \[25.67\]
  Millet (Kg/ha)                 917.99 (1575.36)       881.01 (1502.64)              1230.84 (2067.94)                                  0.03 \[0.34\]           -0.60\* \[0.36\]              5.86\*\*\* \[0.89\]
  Sorghum (Kg/ha)                853.89 (1265.26)       822.51 (1200.58) †            1147.74 (1734.17) †                                0.65\*\* \[0.30\]       0.30 \[0.32\]                 4.08\*\*\* \[0.89\]
  Beans (Kg/ha)                  928.27 (1924.50)       914.18 (1901.54)              1071.86 (2142.27)                                  1.12\* \[0.59\]         0.46 \[0.53\]                 4.81 \[9.69\]
  Peanut (Kg/ha)                 1141.43 (2187.73)      1112.18 (2021.07)             1443.32 (3456.80)                                  2.84\*\*\* \[0.69\]     1.62\*\*\* \[0.44\]           15.62\*\* \[7.27\]
  Cassava (Kg/ha)                1022.52 (2155.65)      1022.44 (2099.04)             1023.13 (2559.96)                                  9.62 \[103.54\]         10.18\*\*\* \[1.12\] †        297.62 \[25469.77\] †
  Yam (Kg/ha)                    1290.37 (2499.26)      1281.58 (2425.02) †           1397.28 (3278.97) †                                12.20\*\*\* \[1.13\]    11.82\*\*\* \[1.17\] †        15.55\*\*\* \[3.99\] †
  Cocoyam (Kg/ha)                342.84 (913.79)        311.46 (775.97) †             568.13 (1573.42) †                                 11.27\*\*\* \[2.34\]    9.68\*\*\* \[1.65\] †         25.41 \[17.29\] †
  Plantain (Kg/ha)               731.60 (1622.34)       695.23 (1556.40)              946.47 (1955.41)                                   5.81 \[33.90\]          4.12 \[35.21\]                6.67\*\*\* \[2.47\]
  Pepper (Kg/ha)                 459.45 (1211.06)       478.58 (1242.88) †            283.70 (849.81) †                                  -8.42 \[20.39\]         -9.43 \[21.66\] †             1.48 \[3.35\] †
  Okra (kg/ha)                   289.38 (586.12)        293.60 (588.92) †             232.27 (549.85) †                                  8.83\*\*\* \[1.96\]     8.64\*\*\* \[1.88\] †         11.19 \[11.95\] †
  Tomato (kg/ha)                 367.89 (991.28)        371.41 (963.90) †             341.45 (1186.78) †                                 9.23\*\*\* \[2.86\]     9.47\*\*\* \[3.06\] †         7.30 \[7.98\] †
  Cocoa (Kg/ha)                  612.78 (1423.59)       584.45 (1293.68)              784.66 (2035.06)                                   2.86\* \[1.58\]         3.61\*\*\* \[0.73\]           -6.47 \[24.60\]
  Palm (Kg/ha)                   1316.13 (3141.27)      1272.52 (2817.58) †           1672.69 (5069.08) †                                1.19 \[1.21\]           0.96 \[1.23\] †               3.23 \[5.16\] †
  Land (ha)                      1.84 (2.54)            1.85 (2.54)                   1.77 (2.54)                                        0.29\*\* \[0.14\]       0.47\*\*\* \[0.14\]           -1.21\*\* \[0.48\]
  Land owned (dummy)             0.59 (0.49)            0.59 (0.49)                   0.61 (0.49)                                        2.27\*\*\* \[0.10\]     2.45\*\*\* \[0.10\]           0.69\*\* \[0.30\]
  Crop diversification (index)   0.49 (0.26)            0.49 (0.26) †                 0.48 (0.26) †                                      -0.54\*\*\* \[0.06\]    -0.54\*\*\* \[0.06\] †        -0.49\*\* \[0.21\] †
  Seed (real GH₵/ha)             99.67 (559.39)         99.59 (559.60) †              100.41 (557.73) †                                  38.97 \[291.28\]        38.72 \[298.83\] †            44.93 \[1276.38\] †
  Household labor (AE)           7.00 (6.48)            7.03 (6.51)                   6.79 (6.28)                                        1.60\*\*\* \[0.09\]     1.51\*\*\* \[0.10\]           2.34\*\*\* \[0.29\]
  Hired labor (man-days/ha)      20.05 (117.26)         20.16 (122.41) †              19.13 (58.31) †                                    -0.43 \[0.51\]          -0.35 \[0.55\] †              -1.08 \[1.07\] †
  Fertilizer (Kg/ha)             174.64 (6156.04)       179.26 (6509.57) †            135.83 (557.68) †                                  3.96 \[3.63\]           4.20 \[3.96\] †               1.30 \[2.77\] †
  Pesticide (Liter/ha)           12.64 (253.56)         12.83 (267.95) †              11.03 (36.24) †                                    3.72\* \[2.06\]         4.25\* \[2.23\] †             -2.42 \[3.79\] †
  Mechanization (dummy)          0.09 (0.28)            0.08 (0.28)                   0.12 (0.32)                                        -12.61\*\*\* \[0.48\]   -12.37\*\*\* \[0.51\]         -14.52\*\*\* \[1.33\]
  Irrigation (dummy)             0.01 (0.11)            0.01 (0.11) †                 0.02 (0.14) †                                      11.83\*\*\* \[1.26\]    12.04\*\*\* \[1.38\] †        10.04\*\*\* \[2.41\] †
  Credit (dummy)                 0.17 (0.38)            0.17 (0.38) †                 0.18 (0.39) †                                      -5.14\*\*\* \[0.25\]    -5.26\*\*\* \[0.27\] †        -4.09\*\*\* \[0.76\] †
  **Household**                                                                                                                                                                                
  Size (AE)                      5.42 (3.15)            5.44 (3.15)                   5.28 (3.13)                                        0.41\*\*\* \[0.07\]     0.37\*\*\* \[0.08\] †         0.73\*\*\* \[0.22\] †
  Dependency (ratio)             1.42 (1.68)            1.42 (1.69) †                 1.38 (1.58) †                                      0.04 \[0.15\]           0.04 \[0.15\] †               0.00 \[0.43\] †

\* Significance levels: \* p\<0.10, \*\* p\<0.05, \*\*\*p\<0.01. † Indicate insignificant (p\<0.05) variation across resource extraction status.

^a^ The trend was estimated via a linear regression for continuous variables and a logit model for dummies.

The mean mid-rate interbank FX rate between the Ghana cedi (GH₵) and the US Dollar (\$) for December 2019 was 5.54 GH₵/\$ as reported by the Bank of Ghana

Data Sources: Ghana Living Standards Survey \[waves 4-7\]

#### Table 2. The prevalence of natural resource extraction in Ghanaian crop-producing communities

+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| **Crop**         | **Type of natural resource extraction**                                       |                    |                    |                    |                   |                   |
+==================+===============================================================================+====================+====================+====================+===================+===================+
|                  | **Any type of**                                                               | **Any scale of**   | **Commercial**     | **Informal or**    | **Quarrying**     | **Sand**          |
|                  |                                                                               |                    |                    |                    |                   |                   |
|                  | **resource**                                                                  | **mineral mining** | **mineral mining** | **small-scale**    |                   | **winning**       |
|                  |                                                                               |                    |                    |                    |                   |                   |
|                  | **extraction**                                                                |                    |                    | **mineral mining** |                   |                   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                  | **Headcount ratio over the periods 1998/99 to 2016/17**                       |                    |                    |                    |                   |                   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Banana           | 0.170 (0.377)                                                                 | 0.078 (0.270)      | \-                 | 0.122 (0.329)      | 0.085 (0.280)     | 0.007 (0.081)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cocoa            | 0.141 (0.349)                                                                 | 0.115 (0.319)      | 0.013 (0.114)      | 0.141 (0.348)      | 0.007 (0.083)     | 0.021 (0.143)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Plantain         | 0.145 (0.352)                                                                 | 0.098 (0.297)      | 0.015 (0.121)      | 0.121 (0.327)      | 0.018 (0.132)     | 0.036 (0.186)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Tomato           | 0.117 (0.322)                                                                 | 0.048 (0.214)      | 0.018 (0.134)      | 0.041 (0.199)      | 0.013 (0.112)     | 0.023 (0.150)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cassava          | 0.113 (0.316)                                                                 | 0.073 (0.261)      | 0.011 (0.102)      | 0.091 (0.287)      | 0.015 (0.123)     | 0.026 (0.158)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| All crops listed | 0.106 (0.308)                                                                 | 0.059 (0.236)      | 0.006 (0.076)      | 0.068 (0.251)      | 0.025 (0.157)     | 0.027 (0.163)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cocoyam          | 0.122 (0.328)                                                                 | 0.095 (0.293)      | 0.031 (0.174)      | 0.114 (0.318)      | 0.007 (0.085)     | 0.020 (0.141)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Palm             | 0.109 (0.312)                                                                 | 0.057 (0.232)      | 0.018 (0.132)      | 0.084 (0.278)      | 0.024 (0.153)     | 0.036 (0.186)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Millet           | 0.106 (0.307)                                                                 | 0.064 (0.245)      | 0.005 (0.073)      | 0.074 (0.261)      | 0.038 (0.192)     | 0.017 (0.129)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Eggplant         | 0.108 (0.311)                                                                 | 0.075 (0.263)      | 0.015 (0.123)      | 0.061 (0.240)      | 0.015 (0.121)     | 0.015 (0.121)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Pepper           | 0.098 (0.298)                                                                 | 0.054 (0.227)      | 0.006 (0.075)      | 0.043 (0.202)      | 0.017 (0.128)     | 0.019 (0.138)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Sorghum          | 0.096 (0.295)                                                                 | 0.056 (0.229)      | 0.004 (0.066)      | 0.070 (0.255)      | 0.036 (0.186)     | 0.016 (0.125)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Maize            | 0.090 (0.286)                                                                 | 0.041 (0.197)      | 0.005 (0.067)      | 0.045 (0.207)      | 0.023 (0.151)     | 0.030 (0.170)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Beans            | 0.089 (0.285)                                                                 | 0.044 (0.204)      | 0.005 (0.068)      | 0.049 (0.217)      | 0.030 (0.170)     | 0.019 (0.138)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Peanut           | 0.088 (0.284)                                                                 | 0.041 (0.199)      | \-                 | 0.046 (0.210)      | 0.033 (0.180)     | 0.020 (0.142)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Rice             | 0.085 (0.278)                                                                 | 0.040 (0.196)      | 0.006 (0.076)      | 0.043 (0.204)      | 0.030 (0.170)     | 0.019 (0.135)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Yam              | 0.076 (0.265)                                                                 | 0.040 (0.197)      | 0.003 (0.054)      | 0.032 (0.177)      | 0.011 (0.104)     | 0.023 (0.151)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Okra             | 0.069 (0.253)                                                                 | 0.031 (0.174)      | 0.005 (0.070)      | 0.036 (0.188)      | 0.014 (0.118)     | 0.014 (0.118)     |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                  | **Percentage change in the probability of incidence from 1998/99 to 2016/17** |                    |                    |                    |                   |                   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Banana           | -4.415 \[4.357\]                                                              | 19.829 \[8.142\]   | \-                 | 30.929 \[14.605\]  | 0.000 \[0.000\]   | -29.329 \[2.192\] |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cocoa            | 3.855 \[0.759\]                                                               | 5.551 \[0.936\]    | 45.364 \[9.781\]   | -0.244 \[2.619\]   | 3.000 \[3.279\]   | -2.964 \[1.643\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Plantain         | 3.624 \[0.690\]                                                               | 5.308 \[0.935\]    | 62.179 \[15.695\]  | -6.191 \[3.023\]   | 10.044 \[2.516\]  | -1.446 \[1.223\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Tomato           | 4.370 \[2.054\]                                                               | -1.352 \[3.056\]   | 68.595 \[32.821\]  | -41.210 \[13.986\] | 7.485 \[3.181\]   | -4.864 \[4.374\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cassava          | 2.031 \[0.515\]                                                               | 4.818 \[0.698\]    | 38.507 \[8.929\]   | -10.813 \[2.493\]  | 1.944 \[1.548\]   | -3.215 \[1.013\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| All crops listed | 2.038 \[0.404\]                                                               | 3.133 \[0.611\]    | 47.005 \[6.365\]   | -5.335 \[1.736\]   | 3.515 \[0.852\]   | -0.284 \[0.703\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Cocoyam          | 3.507 \[1.728\]                                                               | 7.803 \[2.319\]    | 103.086 \[31.203\] | -13.876 \[7.386\]  | 5.760 \[8.190\]   | -12.398 \[2.388\] |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Palm             | 4.053 \[1.317\]                                                               | 8.026 \[2.291\]    | 35.905 \[20.001\]  | -5.765 \[7.856\]   | -1.937 \[2.056\]  | 2.718 \[2.100\]   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Millet           | 3.745 \[0.889\]                                                               | 3.840 \[1.100\]    | 0.000 \[0.000\]    | -12.320 \[3.830\]  | 3.188 \[1.601\]   | 10.370 \[1.668\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Eggplant         | -1.443 \[2.753\]                                                              | -1.431 \[3.603\]   | -1.188 \[31.246\]  | 10.474 \[16.692\]  | 4.992 \[4.665\]   | -13.631 \[4.987\] |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Pepper           | -4.427 \[1.175\]                                                              | -3.339 \[1.609\]   | 0.000 \[0.000\]    | -30.178 \[7.928\]  | -10.679 \[3.031\] | -8.566 \[2.232\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Sorghum          | 3.239 \[0.905\]                                                               | 3.931 \[1.183\]    | 0.000 \[0.000\]    | -22.214 \[4.515\]  | 1.521 \[1.499\]   | 9.124 \[1.986\]   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Maize            | 1.363 \[0.462\]                                                               | 2.319 \[0.695\]    | 43.763 \[8.379\]   | -8.480 \[2.508\]   | 4.061 \[0.977\]   | -0.605 \[0.844\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Beans            | 7.470 \[0.965\]                                                               | 5.809 \[1.405\]    | 0.000 \[0.000\]    | -13.604 \[4.505\]  | 8.947 \[1.456\]   | 11.908 \[2.719\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Peanut           | 4.182 \[0.768\]                                                               | 0.344 \[1.080\]    | \-                 | -17.409 \[4.307\]  | 9.620 \[0.886\]   | 14.805 \[1.997\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Rice             | 7.213 \[1.128\]                                                               | 5.475 \[1.733\]    | 0.000 \[0.000\]    | -8.765 \[5.313\]   | 13.064 \[1.210\]  | 4.457 \[2.181\]   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Yam              | -5.533 \[1.159\]                                                              | -3.909 \[1.731\]   | 71.410 \[30.512\]  | -12.245 \[7.238\]  | 7.001 \[3.824\]   | -6.163 \[1.992\]  |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
| Okra             | 1.292 \[2.293\]                                                               | 5.343 \[4.020\]    | 0.159 \[30.845\]   | 9.255 \[11.940\]   | -16.354 \[5.566\] | 3.744 \[4.931\]   |
+------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-------------------+-------------------+

Standard deviations are in parenthesis and standard errors are in brackets.

Data Sources: Ghana Living Standards Survey \[waves 4-7\]

#### Table 3. Natural resource extraction impact on input elasticities and variability in crop production metrics in Ghana 

+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
|                                            | **Naïve national\   | ** ** | **Group frontier**  | ** **               | **Meta-frontier**    |   |                     |                     |
|                                            | frontier**          |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+============================================+=====================+=======+=====================+=====================+======================+===+=====================+=====================+
|                                            |                     |       | **No extraction**   | **Some extraction** | **Difference**       |   | **Matched**         | **Unmatched**       |
|                                            |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
|                                            |                     |       | **\[A\]**           | **\[B\]**           | **\[B-A\]**          |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| **[Elasticity]{.underline}**               |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Land                                     | 0.706\*\*\* (0.002) |       | 0.706\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.760\*\*\* (0.020) | 0.053\*\* (0.020)    |   | 0.696\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.703\*\*\* (0.005) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Planting material                        | 0.048\*\*\* (0.000) |       | 0.051\*\*\* (0.000) | 0.023\*\*\* (0.001) | -0.023\*\*\* (0.001) |   | 0.040\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.048\*\*\* (0.001) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Family labor                             | 0.206\*\*\* (0.001) |       | 0.199\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.255\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.054\*\*\* (0.003)  |   | 0.206\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.203\*\*\* (0.002) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Hired labor                              | 0.023\*\*\* (0.000) |       | 0.023\*\*\* (0.000) | 0.032\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.009\*\*\* (0.001)  |   | 0.027\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.025\*\*\* (0.001) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Fertilizer                               | 0.019\*\*\* (0.000) |       | 0.020\*\*\* (0.000) | 0.023\*\*\* (0.000) | 0.002\*\*\* (0.000)  |   | 0.026\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.020\*\*\* (0.001) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Pesticide                                | 0.010\*\*\* (0.000) |       | 0.010\*\*\* (0.000) | 0.010\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.000 (0.001)        |   | 0.012\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.010\*\*\* (0.000) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Returns to scale                         | 1.012\*\*\* (0.002) |       | 1.010\*\*\* (0.002) | 1.103\*\*\* (0.020) | 0.095\*\*\* (0.021)  |   | 1.007\*\*\* (0.005) | 1.009\*\*\* (0.006) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| **[Technology/efficiency]{.underline}**    |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Technology gap ratio (TGR)               |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Matched                                  | \-                  |       | 0.819\*\*\* (0.011) | 0.726\*\*\* (0.019) | -0.093\*\*\* (0.009) |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Unmatched                                | \-                  |       | 0.924\*\*\* (0.008) | 0.752\*\*\* (0.007) | -0.171\*\*\* (0.005) |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Pure farmer technical efficiency (TE)    |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Matched                                  | 0.445\*\*\* (0.001) |       | 0.454\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.511\*\*\* (0.003) | 0.057\*\*\* (0.003)  |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Unmatched                                | 0.499\*\*\* (0.001) |       | 0.507\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.509\*\*\* (0.003) | 0.002 (0.003)        |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Meta-frontier technical efficiency (MTE) |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Matched                                  | 0.358\*\*\* (0.008) |       | 0.371\*\*\* (0.005) | 0.349\*\*\* (0.010) | -0.022\*\*\* (0.006) |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Unmatched                                | 0.460\*\*\* (0.004) |       | 0.473\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.363\*\*\* (0.003) | -0.110\*\*\* (0.002) |   | \-                  | \-                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| **[Model diagnostics]{.underline}**        |                     |       |                     |                     |                      |   |                     |                     |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Sample size                              | 26811               |       | 23957               | 2854                | \-                   |   | 5572                | 26811               |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Monotonicity satisfaction rate           | 53.35               |       | 73.47               | 76.04               | \-                   |   | 89.99               | 99.88               |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Curvature satisfaction rate              | 13.83               |       | 26.78               | 29.34               | \-                   |   | 71.44               | 41.06               |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Schmidt & Lin (1984) ^a^                 | -0.258\*\*\*        |       | -0.247\*\*\*        | -0.205\*\*\*        | \-                   |   | -0.702\*\*\*        | -3.245\*\*\*        |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Coelli, (1995) ^a^                       | -8.342\*\*\*        |       | -7.568\*\*\*        | -2.173              | \-                   |   | -12.308\*\*\*       | -114.307\*\*\*      |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Gutierrez (2001) ^a^                     | 592.590\*\*         |       | 543.844\*\*         | 84.088\*\*          | \-                   |   | 531.763\*\*         | 2650.340\*\*        |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Log likelihood                           | -9340               |       | -8288               | -976                | \-                   |   | 263                 | 4568                |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > No. of parameters                        | 33                  |       | 33                  | 33                  | \-                   |   | 33                  | 33                  |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Meta frontier LR test                    | \-                  |       | \-                  | \-                  | \-                   |   | 676.936             | 9288.023            |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+
| > Ratio variance due to inefficiency       | 0.746\*\*\* (0.055) |       | 0.741\*\*\* (0.056) | 0.788\*\*\* (0.070) | \-                   |   | 0.895\*\*\* (0.146) | 0.677\*\*\* (0.250) |
+--------------------------------------------+---------------------+-------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+---+---------------------+---------------------+

Significance levels: \* p\<0.10, \*\* p\<0.05, \*\*\*p\<0.01

^a^ Null hypothesis of no one-sided error (i.e., no inefficiency) was tested.

Meta Stochastic Frontier Analysis was jointly performed on Ghana Living Standards Survey \[waves 4-7\]).

Standard errors were estimated via the jackknife resampling method by iteratively generating 100 resampled datasets by randomly excluding one enumeration area from each survey for every resample.

#### Table 4. Technology level and technical efficiency gaps based on extraction activity in Ghana

+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
|                                                        | **No extraction**   | **Some extraction** | **Difference**       |
|                                                        |                     |                     |                      |
|                                                        | **\[A\]**           | **\[B\]**           | **\[B-A\]**          |
+========================================================+=====================+=====================+======================+
| [Technology gap ratio (TGR)]{.underline}               |                     |                     |                      |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any type of resource extraction                        | 0.819\*\*\* (0.011) | 0.726\*\*\* (0.019) | -0.093\*\*\* (0.009) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any scale of mineral mining                            | 0.868\*\*\* (0.006) | 0.666\*\*\* (0.020) | -0.202\*\*\* (0.019) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Informal or small-scale mineral mining                 | 0.899\*\*\* (0.006) | 0.815\*\*\* (0.004) | -0.084\*\*\* (0.003) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Quarrying                                              | 0.905\*\*\* (0.003) | 0.780\*\*\* (0.017) | -0.124\*\*\* (0.015) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Sand winning                                           | 0.923\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.762\*\*\* (0.013) | -0.161\*\*\* (0.012) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| [Pure farmer technical efficiency (TE)]{.underline}    |                     |                     |                      |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any type of resource extraction                        | 0.454\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.511\*\*\* (0.003) | 0.057\*\*\* (0.003)  |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any scale of mineral mining                            | 0.462\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.472\*\*\* (0.017) | 0.010 (0.018)        |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Informal or small-scale mineral mining                 | 0.506\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.443\*\*\* (0.001) | -0.063\*\*\* (0.001) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Quarrying                                              | 0.486\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.515\*\*\* (0.017) | 0.029 (0.017)        |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Sand winning                                           | 0.471\*\*\* (0.001) | 0.725\*\*\* (0.016) | 0.253\*\*\* (0.016)  |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| [Meta-frontier technical efficiency (MTE)]{.underline} |                     |                     |                      |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any type of resource extraction                        | 0.371\*\*\* (0.005) | 0.349\*\*\* (0.010) | -0.022\*\*\* (0.006) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Any scale of mineral mining                            | 0.405\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.304\*\*\* (0.005) | -0.101\*\*\* (0.004) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Informal or small-scale mineral mining                 | 0.458\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.362\*\*\* (0.002) | -0.096\*\*\* (0.001) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Quarrying                                              | 0.438\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.377\*\*\* (0.003) | -0.061\*\*\* (0.003) |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+
| Sand winning                                           | 0.434\*\*\* (0.002) | 0.523\*\*\* (0.004) | 0.089\*\*\* (0.004)  |
+--------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+---------------------+----------------------+

Significance levels: \* p\<0.10, \*\* p\<0.05, \*\*\*p\<0.01

Meta Stochastic Frontier Analysis was jointly performed on Ghana Living Standards Survey \[waves 4 to 7\]).

Standard errors were estimated via the jackknife resampling method by iteratively generating 100 resampled datasets by randomly excluding one enumeration area from each survey for every resample.

**Figure 1. The association between natural resource extraction activities and farm productivity from 1998-2017**

```{r fig-1, echo=FALSE, out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../output/figure/score_trend.png")
```

**Figure 2. Crop production technology adoption and technical efficiency gaps associated with natural resource extraction by farmer gender, age, and education in Ghana**

```{r fig-2, echo=FALSE, out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../output/figure/heterogeneity_genderAge.png")
```

**Figure 3. Crop production technology adoption and technical efficiency gaps associated with natural resource extraction by major crops and administrative regions in Ghana**

```{r fig-3, echo=FALSE, out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../output/figure/heterogeneity_crop_region.png")
```
